elbow_state.hpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1 #pragma once
2 
3 #include <array>
4 #include <iostream>
5 #include <optional>
6 
7 namespace franky {
8 
12 enum class FlipDirection { kNegative = -1, kNeutral = 0, kPositive = 1 };
13 
14 std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const FlipDirection &flip_direction);
15 
24 class ElbowState {
25  public:
33  explicit ElbowState(double joint_3_pos, std::optional<FlipDirection> joint_4_flip = std::nullopt)
34  : joint_3_pos_(joint_3_pos), joint_4_flip_(joint_4_flip) {}
35 
42  explicit ElbowState(const std::array<double, 2> &elbow_state)
43  : joint_3_pos_(elbow_state[0]), joint_4_flip_([&]() -> std::optional<FlipDirection> {
44  if (elbow_state[1] < 0.0) {
45  return FlipDirection::kNegative;
46  } else if (elbow_state[1] == 0.0) {
47  return FlipDirection::kNeutral;
48  } else {
49  return FlipDirection::kPositive;
50  }
51  }()) {}
52 
53  ElbowState(const ElbowState &) = default;
54  ElbowState() = default;
55 
63  [[nodiscard]] inline std::array<double, 2> to_array(
64  FlipDirection default_flip_direction = FlipDirection::kNegative) const {
65  return {joint_3_pos_, static_cast<double>(joint_4_flip_.value_or(default_flip_direction))};
66  }
67 
71  [[nodiscard]] inline double joint_3_pos() const { return joint_3_pos_; }
72 
76  [[nodiscard]] inline std::optional<FlipDirection> joint_4_flip() const { return joint_4_flip_; }
77 
78  friend std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const ElbowState &elbow_state);
79 
80  private:
81  double joint_3_pos_{0.0};
82  std::optional<FlipDirection> joint_4_flip_{std::nullopt};
83 };
84 
85 } // namespace franky
